title: 4. The extraordinary connections of Kidney and San Jiao
text:
In the treatment of nephritis, Master Tung often used Zhongbai (22.06) and Xiabai (22.07).  The two points
were also used to treat edema.  Besides, Zhongzhu (SJ3) is often selected to treat lower back pain, as well
as waist pain.  Zhishen (11.15) point is located on the ring finger (San Jiao channel) and it can treat dry
mouth due to kidney deficiency. Master Tung’s another extraordinary point Huanchao (11.06) is often
needled to treat infertility.  Those points are located on the San Jiao channel and they function through
the extraordinary connection of Zang Fu to strengthen the kidney.
